rounds.title: Blockbuster Duos
rounds.description: Two questions for each of the year's biggest opening features.

questions.question: Which actor takes on the mantle of the Man of Steel in the 2025 film directed by James Gunn?
In the 2025 'Superman' reboot, which actor portrays the iconic villain Lex Luthor?
In 'A Minecraft Movie', which actor portrays the character known as Steve?
Which director, known for 'Napoleon Dynamite', helmed the live-action Minecraft adaptation?
Which actress leads the cast of the 20th Century Studios production 'Jurassic World Rebirth'?
The 2025 film 'Jurassic World Rebirth' was directed by the filmmaker behind 2014's 'Godzilla'. Who is he?
Which actor headlines the 2025 Formula 1 racing drama simply titled 'F1'?
Directed by Joseph Kosinski, the film 'F1' features which actor as the younger teammate Joshua Pearce?
In the third installment titled 'Fire and Ash', which actor returns to play Jake Sully?
Which filmmaker returned to write and direct the 2025 epic 'Avatar: Fire and Ash'?

rounds.title: Sequels & Series Refreshes
rounds.description: Focusing on the 2025 entries in established franchises.

questions.question: Which actor officially leads 'Captain America: Brave New World' as the new Cap, Sam Wilson?
In 'Captain America: Brave New World', which Screen Legend takes over the role of Thaddeus 'Thunderbolt' Ross?
In the Marvel film 'Thunderbolts*', which actress reprises her role as the assassin Yelena Belova?
Which actor, known for playing the Winter Soldier, is a central part of the 'Thunderbolts*' team?
Which actress portrays Elphaba Thropp in the 2025 musical sequel 'Wicked: For Good'?
In the 'Wicked' films, which pop star plays the role of Glinda Upland?
Which actor portrays Reed Richards (Mr. Fantastic) in the 2025 MCU film 'The Fantastic Four: First Steps'?
Who plays Johnny Storm, also known as the Human Torch, in 'The Fantastic Four: First Steps'?
Which actor returns as the voice of Nick Wilde in the animated sequel 'Zootopia 2'?
In 'Zootopia 2', which actress reprises her role as the voice of Judy Hopps?

rounds.title: Animation & Live-Action Adaptations
rounds.description: Pairs from the world of animation and its live-action counterparts.

questions.question: Which child actress portrays the title character in the 2025 live-action 'Lilo & Stitch' film?
In the 2025 live-action 'Lilo & Stitch', who returned to provide the iconic voice of Experiment 626?
Which actor portrays the live-action version of Hiccup in the 2025 adaptation of 'How to Train Your Dragon'?
Who directed the 2025 live-action 'How to Train Your Dragon', having also helmed the original animated trilogy?
In the 2025 Disney animated film 'Elio', which actor provides the voice for the lead character, Elio Solis?
Which Academy Award-winning 'America's Ugly Betty' actress voices Elio's mother, Olga, in the 2025 film?
In the 2025 live-action 'Snow White', which actress takes on the role of the titular princess?
Which 'Wonder Woman' star portrays the Evil Queen in the 2025 live-action 'Snow White' movie?
The 2025 animated film 'The Bad Guys 2' features which Academy Award winner as the voice of Mr. Wolf?
Which actress, known for 'The Joker', voices the character of Fox (Diane Foxington) in 'The Bad Guys' series?

rounds.title: Director's Vision
rounds.description: Pairs focusing on the filmmakers and their 2025 projects.

questions.question: Which filmmaker directed the 2025 science fiction film 'Mickey 17'?
In Bong Joon-ho's 'Mickey 17', which actor plays the lead role of a 'replaceable' employee?
Which director returned to the '28 Days Later' franchise to helm the 2025 sequel '28 Years Later'?
Which Academy Award winner reprises his role as Jim in the 2025 film '28 Years Later'?
Which director, known for 'Baby Driver', directed the 2025 adaptation of 'The Running Man'?
Who stars as Ben Richards in the 2025 version of 'The Running Man', originally played by Arnold Schwarzenegger?
Which director re-teamed with Michael B. Jordan for the 2025 supernatural horror film 'Sinners'?
In the 2025 film 'Sinners', which actor plays the dual roles of twin brothers?
Which director, famous for 'The Sixth Sense', released the thriller 'Vicious' in 2025?
The 2025 horror sequel 'The Black Phone 2' was directed by the filmmaker behind the 2012 film 'Sinister'. Who is he?

rounds.title: Genre Grab-bag
rounds.description: A final look at the various hits and surprises of 2025.

questions.question: In the 2025 John Wick spin-off 'Ballerina', which actress portrays the lead character Eve Macarro?
Which actor makes a cameo appearance as John Wick in the 2025 film 'Ballerina'?
Which actor returns to lead the cast of the 2025 action sequel 'Nobody 2'?
In 'Nobody 2', which actress joins the cast as a new antagonist?
Which actor portrays Ares in the 2025 science fiction sequel 'Tron: Ares'?
The 2025 film 'Tron: Ares' features which 'X-Men' actor in a leading role alongside Jared Leto?
In the 2025 film 'Final Destination: Bloodlines', which series regular role is played by Brec Bassinger?
Which horror franchise released its 11th installment, 'Saw XI', in 2025?
In 'The Conjuring: Last Rites', which actress reprises her role as Lorraine Warren?
Which actor plays Ed Warren for the final time in the 2025 film 'The Conjuring: Last Rites'?
